planSteps.description: Navigate to the landing page and verify the boot sequence appears with terminal-style initialization text
Wait for boot sequence to finish and click 'INITIALIZE // ENTER THE VOID' button to proceed
On the landing page, verify the void.crawler() title is visible and click 'INITIALIZE SEQUENCE' button
On the naming screen, type a character name and click 'ASSIGN IDENTITY // PROCEED' button
On the hub, verify the tutorial overlay appears with step-by-step guidance for new users
Click through all 4 tutorial steps and dismiss the tutorial
Verify the hub shows zone cards (CART_CHAOS, PANEL_PANIC, ANOMALY.ZONE, THE_VOID) with descriptions
Verify the progression guide panel is visible with objectives
Hover over the LEVEL stat to see tooltip explaining what level does
Click on CART_CHAOS zone card to navigate to the market
On the market page, verify items are displayed with geometric symbols and prices
Click on an item to add it to the cart
Click the back button to return to the hub
Click on PANEL_PANIC zone card to navigate to the dashboard
On the dashboard, verify metrics are displayed and the slot machine is visible
Click the back button to return to the hub
Click on ANOMALY.ZONE zone card to navigate to the cyber zone
On the cyber zone, verify the Pattern Scanner and Signal Strength sections are visible
Click the back button to return to the hub
Click on THE_VOID zone card to navigate to the playground
On the playground, verify the input field and void interpretation sections are visible
Click the back button to return to the hub
Verify the save indicator shows 'PROGRESS AUTO-SAVED' in the corner
Click the settings button (bottom-right) and verify the settings panel opens
In settings, verify the 'Re-enable Tutorial' and 'Reset Progress' options are visible
Close the settings panel
Verify the chaos meter is visible and shows current chaos level
Verify the enhanced HUD shows character name, level, XP, HP, and gold
